meaning: Pan American Union [史]泛美联盟  波城[法国西南部城市](避寒胜地)
examples: Pau and Andrew, their work on the boards tonight was sensational.
Pau Gasol had 13 points and 10 rebounds, but the Lakers failed to gain control of the contest.
In November we'll all act surprised that Pau is still clearly the league's second-best center.
Dwight Howard and Steve Nash joined a team that already had Kobe Bryant and Pau Gasol.
After shipping Lamar Odom to Dallas, they have Kobe Bryant, Pau Gasol and Metta World Peace.
